studyName: Integrative Clinical Sequencing Analysis of Metastatic Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer Reveals a High Frequency of Clinical Actionability

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use of participants with prostate cancer and involved in the "Stand Up To Cancer East Coast Prostate Cancer Research Group" project.
